calendar.matters:
REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Jun-29-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Caroline Hinshaw and Administrator Henderson Lu to appear on Jun-29-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain the failure to appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
